areas.name: hermes-integration
areas.summary: All 14 actionable iter-1 findings fixed in commit 83fa863. Build noise: 19 -> 1 discovery log. Cache invalidation centralized via shouldInvalidateEndpoint(). directOnly split into strict/fire-and-forget. checkResponse routes chat 401 to Slack fallback. SSE [DONE] flag hoisted. Sync triggerError surfaces in 0.67s instead of 30s spinner. Slack guard + exec throw. Model name validation. timeAgo refactor. KanbanEventsShim error logged.

areas.name: kanban
areas.summary: Prod verified: 7 unique API calls, TTFB 48ms, no StrictMode duplication, no SSE storm. SSE [DONE] hoist (M-03) also benefits kanban event handling.

areas.name: calendar
areas.summary: H1 (sync dedupe) FIXED iter1. H2 (unpaginated Scan deletes orphans) FIXED iter3 commit 7f9b873 — now paginates, aborts on cap.

areas.name: chat
areas.summary: Both CRITICALs closed by middleware iter2. M-02 (401 fallback) FIXED iter3. M-03 (SSE [DONE]) FIXED iter3.

areas.name: terminal
areas.summary: CR-01 closed by middleware iter2. CR-02 (allow-list validates only first token) FIXED iter3 commit 30ef1d5 — length cap + newline/control-char rejection. parseInt radix fixed iter2.

areas.name: agents
areas.summary: CR-01 closed by middleware iter2. CR-02 (seed?force=1) FIXED iter2. WR-05 (err leak) FIXED iter2.

areas.name: memory
areas.summary: CR-01 closed by middleware iter2. CR-02 (unpaginated Scan + filter-after-limit) FIXED iter3 commit 198148a. WR-02 dynamic-import FIXED iter1. WR-06 animation cap FIXED iter2.

areas.name: auth
areas.summary: Basic-auth middleware iter2 commit 0a2cecb. Verified anon 401, AIOWL:AIOWL 200, /api/hermes/update webhook bypass works.

areas.name: dashboard
areas.summary: Renders, TTFB within budget, zero console errors.

areas.name: perf-cross-cutting
areas.summary: All prod TTFB 6-52ms. All bundles under 300KB. Build noise from 19x discovery to 1x. M-06 sync 30s -> 0.67s.

flagged_items_remaining: BUILD: next@14.2.5 critical security advisory — user handling upgrade in separate session per their instruction
fixes_shipped_iter3: calendar/H2: paginate sync Scan + abort on truncation (commit 7f9b873)
hermes batch: 14 findings from iter-1 review (commit 83fa863)
